metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_42
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunolabeling of highly purified synaptic vesicles with antibodies selective for Rab26 by immuno electron microscopy and immunoblotting indicates the presence of this GTPase in synaptic vesicles. Fluorescence microscopy with anti-Rab26 antibodies further indicate the localisation of endogenous Rab26 to presynaptic compartments via colocalisation with synaptotagmin 1.

Uniprot: Lipidation 253/254 S-geranylgeranyl cysteine. Experimental description: Sequencing of cDNA encoded by plasmid. Not mentioned in the paper.

19/01/2017 Pim
Note: please note that the expert that created this annotation is part of the lab that created this publication. The species information is therefore derived from direct communication with the authors.
